initial_subject: Created users (private homeserver): `@kevin:colossus.bobcat-paradise.ts.net`, `@cce-bot-colossus:colossus.bobcat-paradise.ts.net` (passwords generated/stored locally in `/private/tmp/cce-matrix-users.txt` with mode `0600`; not printed).
intake_question:
Continue in /Users/kevinmattice/cce.

We are executing Private Matrix Homeserver Gate 2.

Gate 1 passed:
- Postgres running
- Synapse running
- Client API reachable

Goal of Gate 2:
Create the Kevin account and CCE bot account.
Verify Matrix password login works.

Nothing else.

Important:
Do not configure Element.
Do not run Tailscale Serve.
Do not create a room.
Do not invite users.
Do not modify CCE config.
Do not run the CCE gateway.
Do not test workspaces.
Do not test PDF support.
Do not test Matrix rooms.
Do not enable federation.

This gate verifies only:

Kevin can password-login.
Bot can password-login.

Tasks:

1. Verify services remain healthy:
- docker compose ps
- confirm Synapse and Postgres still running

2. Review the Synapse operator documentation/runbook.

3. Create a Kevin Matrix user account on the private homeserver.
Use a locally chosen password.
Do not print the password.

4. Create a CCE bot Matrix user account.
Suggested:
- cce-bot-colossus
Use a locally chosen password.
Do not print the password.

5. Record credentials only in appropriate local operator files if required.
Do not commit them.
Do not print them.

6. Confirm users exist via appropriate Synapse administrative tooling.

7. Verify Kevin login:
- perform a direct Matrix Client-Server API password login
- do not use Element
- do not print access tokens
- report success/failure only

8. Verify bot login:
- perform a direct Matrix Client-Server API password login
- do not use Element
- do not print access tokens
- report success/failure only

9. If login succeeds:
- verify returned user_id matches expected account
- verify device_id is returned
- do not print access tokens

10. Verify:
- no matrix.org dependency involved
- no external auth provider involved
- no OIDC/MAS dependency involved

11. Update documentation:
- docs/private-matrix-homeserver.md
- docs/decision-log.md

Document:
- Gate 1 passed
- Gate 2 passed (if applicable)
- locale workaround used
- listener correction used

12. Re-read changed docs.

13. Provide a forensic report:

- users created
- login verification result
- user_id verification result
- device_id returned yes/no
- auth path used
- matrix.org dependency yes/no
- services still healthy yes/no
- docs updated
- anything still unverified

Completion rule:

Gate 2 passes only if:
- Kevin account exists
- Bot account exists
- Kevin password login succeeds
- Bot password login succeeds

No rooms, Element, or CCE integration in this gate.
